name: The Last Bloom
short_description: Margarete receives a letter from Veronika, her kind neighbor, saying she’s ill. Concerned, Margarete decides to visit, but the journey is challenging due to her blindness. Now it’s time for you, her trusty four-legged friend, to guide her and help her reach Veronika’s house.
detailed_description:
The Last Bloom is a side-scrolling adventure game that combines adorable visuals, horror (don’t let the visuals fool you), and classic controls, inspired by the legendary Game Boy Advance.

The concept of the game is simple: you play as a dog who can only walk and bark. Your job is to help your blind little master survive various dangerous situations. Sounds tough, doesn't it?

Play Time: 1-2 hours (or longer if you die too often!)


Margarete received a letter from Veronika, her kind-hearted neighbor, informing her that she was ill. Concerned, Margarete decided to visit. However, since she is blind, traveling alone could be too dangerous. Fortunately, she has Fruned, her best friend, who will guide her safely to Veronica's house. And so, their adventure begins.


Help Your Best Friend
Play as Fruned, the loyal companion, who barks to signal Margarete to move or perform various actions. Bark to guide her in the right direction or to prompt her to take important actions in different situations.

An Adventure Full of Emotion
Immerse yourself in a story filled with diverse emotions, and experience multiple endings based on the choices you make.

Challenging Puzzles
Use logic to solve puzzles, such as choosing the right items at the right time. Manage Fruned’s stamina wisely, as exhaustion in critical situations may lead to death.

Tension from Stealth
Along the way, you must avoid enemies who wish to harm you and Margarete. Use strategy and wit to survive.

Search for Hidden Secrets
Explore the game world and use Fruned’s paws to dig for secrets or hidden items, which will help you overcome obstacles or uncover more about the game’s story.

Cute Art Style & Retro Controls
Enjoy the unique and charming art style with controls that take you back to the classic gaming era, evoking nostalgic memories.

*** Note from the developer ***
This game supports controllers, and for optimal performance, we recommend connecting via USB for greater stability.
